sys_script_client.description: 2.6 - moved messages into messages to ensure if changed Template would change also and for internationalization
sys_script_client.messages: Tasker - Wait State Information Message Tasker - Wait State - Information - Approval type with Approval Subtask Tasker - Wait State Information - Task is no longer dependent on the completion of its Subtasks Tasker - Wait State Warning Message
sys_script_client.name: Template -onChange/onLoad-Wait Flag MSG
